name: M-26-14 DM: Data Retirement — Gate 2 Deletion Approval Pending
description: Detects M-26-14 managed indices awaiting Gate 2 (deletion authorization) approval in the data retirement workflow. Fires when a pending_gate2 request is older than 24 hours without final deletion approval. Gate 2 is the last human checkpoint before permanent data deletion. At this stage, the index has been switched to a deletion-eligible ILM policy and a compliance snapshot (wait_for_snapshot) has been taken. The reviewer must verify the snapshot is intact and explicitly authorize deletion. Failure to act means the index ILM will not advance to the delete phase. M-26-14 §5(b) requires documented authorization for data destruction decisions.
author: Elastic
query: FROM m2614-retirement-requests | WHERE state == "pending_gate2" | WHERE DATE_DIFF("hours", created_at, NOW()) > 24 | STATS pending_count = COUNT(*) BY index_name, created_at, phase_age_days, gate1_approved_by, ilm_policy | SORT created_at ASC
note:
## Triage and Investigation

### Step 1 — Verify the compliance snapshot
- Navigate to Kibana > Stack Management > Snapshot and Restore
- Confirm a snapshot exists for the index under `found-snapshots` repository
- Snapshot name will follow the pattern `m2614-compliance-YYYY.MM.DD`
- Alternatively: `GET _snapshot/found-snapshots/_all?index=<index_name>`

### Step 2 — Confirm no active legal holds
- Query `m2614-retirement-requests` for any `legal_hold_initiated` entries covering the same data range.
- Verify with legal/compliance that no ongoing investigations require this data.

### Step 3 — Authorize deletion (Gate 2)
- To **approve Gate 2**: POST to `m2614-retirement-requests` with `{state: approved_gate2, index_name: <name>, gate2_approved_by: <your-username>, gate2_approved_at: <now>}`
- The Gate 2 Execution Watcher (`m2614-gate2-execute-deletion`) will detect this within 1 hour and advance ILM to the delete phase.

### Step 4 — Post-deletion verification
- After deletion, the retirement request state will be updated to `scheduled_for_deletion`.
- Verify index is no longer present: `GET _cat/indices/<index_name>`
- The compliance snapshot will be retained in `found-snapshots` per the m2614-compliance-snapshots SLM policy (7-year retention).
